name: Mokkoji Kitchen
overview: A sweet and salty love recipe drama that revolves around chef Moo Young, who runs a one-person fusion Korean restaurant, and college student Ro In, who knows all the delicious restaurants. The two fatefully become intertwined in each other’s lives and end up sharing food to fill their hearts.

trailers.title: 나랑 먹는 음식이 더 맛있는 거 알죠? [모꼬지 키친] 9월 6일 (월) 첫방송👨🏻‍🍳🧡 | ENG
